identityOneLiner: Read-only tool checks at verify time—not color.
heroSubtitle: Read-only state vs what you declared—not a green trace alone.
visitorProblemAnswer: Green runs are not the same as correct data. Check read-only before ship, bill, or compliance.
heroOutcome: Traces say success. Your actual data does not.
heroMechanism: Read-only checks at verify time: what tools claimed vs. what actually exists.
guaranteeFootnote: Read-only at verify time; not proof which call or step caused a write.

shareableTerminalDemo.title: Bundled terminal proof
shareableTerminalDemo.transcript:
### Success (`wf_complete`)

workflow_id: wf_complete
workflow_status: complete
trust: TRUSTED: Every step matched the database under the configured verification rules.
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Matched the database.

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_complete",
  "status": "complete",
  "steps": [{ "seq": 0, "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact", "status": "verified" }]
}

### Failure (`wf_missing`)

workflow_id: wf_missing
workflow_status: inconsistent
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result:Expected row is missing from the database (the log implies a write that is not present).
    reference_code: ROW_ABSENT

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_missing",
  "status": "inconsistent",
  "steps": [
    {
      "seq": 0,
      "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact",
      "status": "missing",
      "reasons": [{ "code": "ROW_ABSENT" }]
    }
  ]
}

r2.frameworkMaturity: CrewAI: ready. AutoGen: experimental. See repo FRAMEWORK_LOCK.md

integrate.title: Get started
integrate.description: Node 22+, store access, NDJSON, tools.json. One command on /integrate.

pricing.positioning: Do not ship success on bad state.
pricing.subtitle: Plans below. Read limits at checkout.

claim.title: Claim verification run — AgentSkeptic
claim.description: Link a CLI run to an account.

integratePage.proofLine: Activity and read-only state matched for that run.
requirements: Read-only access to a queryable store
Not causal proof; read-only verify only

briefProblem: Claims vs read-only; ROW_ABSENT. Same as site demo.

bullets: Tool claimed a write; store missing it or still wrong.
Green steps; state lags, partial, or wrong.
You still ship, bill, and report success.

mechanism.title: How
items: Map tool IDs in `tools.json` to your registries and stores.
Run read-only verification: JSON or exit code—not trace color.
mechanism.notObservability: State vs. claims; not log search or APM.

homeStakes.stakesTagline: Revenue, compliance, incidents: wrong when trace and data disagree.
tensionBullets: The store does not back the story.
Work continues on a bad read.

forYou: You have store-backed systems: SQL, S3, vectors, Mongo, HTTP, and similar.
Green has hidden bad state before.
notForYou: Unstructured logs only, nothing to query.
You need causal proof of a specific write.
You want a full APM or log product swap.
